title: Asuka was in a Dummy Plug
display_title: Asuka was in a Dummy Plug
wikitext:
[]: Asuka was in a Dummy Plug?             Quote Post by tabrislance » Tue Aug 02, 2011 8:41 am I was editing a bit of video and I noticed that the Entry Plug for Unit 03 looked like a Dummy Plug. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Tue Aug 02, 2011 8:56 am I really don't see it. I mean, the blue SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by tabrislance » Tue Aug 02, 2011 9:16 am svenge wrote: I really don't see it.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Tue Aug 02, 2011 10:01 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by tabrislance » Tue Aug 02, 2011 10:43 am Seele00TextOnly wrote: Couldn't quite make out the colours for sure, but they appear to be red and black.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Aug 02, 2011 3:08 pm Uh, don't all Dummy Plugs look like Entry Plugs? How can you even tell the difference without any sort of "ENTRY/DUMMY PLUG" label?

[]:             Quote Post by tabrislance » Tue Aug 02, 2011 4:14 pm AuraTwilight wrote: Uh, don't all Dummy Plugs look like Entry Plugs? How can you even tell the difference without any sort of "ENTRY/DUMMY PLUG" label?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Tue Aug 02, 2011 4:17 pm Doubt it. It's possible all the entry plugs have different designs.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Aug 02, 2011 4:36 pm Seele00TextOnly wrote: If Asuka's Bardiel plug was a Dummy Plug, which I suppose is possible, I guess it'd be a Kaworu one since IIRC Kaworu is the one that spoke to her in the original scripted scenes there.

[]:             Quote Post by Viking » Tue Aug 02, 2011 4:39 pm I think the Plug used during the activation experiment was just a simple EP with some different markings, but the idea of using a DP would have been good. I mean, I've seen similar ideas ( EVA03 activated using a DP instead of Toji, DP on EVA 02, etc. ) in different fanfics and, considering the Rebuild reality is different from the serie reality... why not? We all know it would have been better... Bye

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 02, 2011 11:09 pm The 2.22 CRC book refers to Asuka's plug specifically as a Test Plug. You may find this page useful.

[]:             Quote Post by Deepak » Sat Aug 20, 2011 6:01 pm there is no reason for them to be using a dummy plug when testing the eva with a pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by Polker11 » Sat Aug 20, 2011 10:38 pm Unless now all Eva's (except unit 00) were now fitted for the dummy plug system, but that most likely would not apply in an activation test. It's probably similar to Eva 01 dummy plug entry plug but some variations that we don't see due to SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Deepak » Sun Aug 21, 2011 7:41 am Yeah I'm guessing after they created the technology of a dummy plug they are using it all the time just in case a pilot (Shinji) decides not to execute an order. But I don't see how that would be a problem for an activation test so I doubt they used a dummy plug for that.
